MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/P. Dias, CSR: Beldon Yee.
Plaintiff, NC Venture I,L.P., present by counsel, Geoffrey Heaton.
The Court hears evidence with supporting declaration presented in court, and grants default judgment in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendants as follows:
Principal of $31,307.17, Interest $2,759.04, Costs $696.00, Attorney's fees $8,917.77, for a total judgment of $43,679.98.
Judgment signed in open court.
